findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'mark piazza | manager, pipeline compliance and r&d colonial pipeline company o. ...' (3x).

findings.description: Email address for Jane Lea Hicks is altered: 'janeleahicks@gmail.com' in the PDF was changed to 'janelecahicks@gmail.com' in the HTML, substituting 'a' with 'c' in the local part of the address.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 CC line: 'Jane Lea Hicks <janeleahicks@gmail.com>'. HTML: 'Jane Lea Hicks <janelecahicks@gmail.com>'. The 'a' in 'lea' was changed to 'c', making it 'lec', which corrupts the email address.
